prompt: Transform these weekly goals into SMART goals: 1) 80/20 of the finance app 2) Work on mobile optimization 3) Finish documentation

assertions.name: transforms-all-tasks
assertions.description: All three input tasks are transformed into SMART goals

assertions.name: includes-deadlines
assertions.description: Each transformed goal includes a time-bound deadline

assertions.name: shows-before-after
assertions.description: Output shows both original and transformed versions
